calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Continued To Oct-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler for Jenny Loi.

The Court noted that the petition to re-open Leona's estate has been filed. The accounting petition was continued to October 8, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Continued To Aug-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler for Jenny Loi (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it thinks that Loena's Estate needs to be re-opened and someone needs to be in a position to receive distribution from William's Estate. Mr. Bressler presented oral argument to support his postition with regard to the identified assets being disributed to Michelle Chang as Trustee of the Leona Chang Trust (referred to 141 Cal App 4th Dehghni and Fard). The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
